text:
claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
001 = Deductible amount 
002 = Coinsurance amount 
003 = Co-payment amount 
004 = The procedure code is inconsistent with the modifier used or a required modifier is missing 
005 = The procedure code/type of bill is inconsistent with the place of service 
006 = The procedure/revenue code is inconsistent with the patient’s age 
007 = The procedure/revenue code is inconsistent with the patient’s sex 
008 = The procedure code
